name: No Bake Chocolate Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and cocoa powder.
2. Add the milk, butter or margarine, peanut butter, and vanilla extract to the dry ingredients.
3. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Place the mixture on the stove over low heat.
5. Cook for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it starts to boil.
6. Remove from the heat and let cool slightly.
7. Add the rolled oats and stir until evenly distributed.
8. Scoop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a plate or baking sheet.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
Makes approximately 3 to 4 dozen cookies. Enjoy!
